title: Sumnjivo lice
actors: Mihajlo 'Bata' Paskaljevic, Rade Markovic, Milivoje 'Mica' Tomic
plot: A small town is disturbed by the arrival of a "suspicious person", an unknown man wanted by the local authorities. During the hunt, it turns out that the suspect is no one else than the mayor's son-in-law who checked under his fal...
